svg.text: Common path on top · per-type lanes below · convergence at cleanup
stop · pause · resume · delete · rerun → no agent loop
pending question → answer · running → inject context
routed via session, no new investigation
classify request_type → spawn asyncio task → call AgentLoop.run()
SKIP: Tier 2 memory · Tier 3 patterns · Incident recall
data tasks don't need historical reasoning
▼ STEP B · BUILD INITIAL USER MESSAGE (loop.py:_build_initial_prompt)
▼ STEP C · RESOLVE LIMITS (config.py two-axis lookup)
critical/high never get a turn nudge
tool can pause loop, post Slack msg, await reply
model can call but tool returns error
▼ STEP E · AGENT LOOP (loop.py for-loop) — same code, different shape per type
progress broadcast to Slack between turns
Format result as a clean table
▼ STEP F · LOOP EXIT (stop_reason="end_turn") · OUTPUT SHAPE
retry once if < 500 chars on forced synthesis
recall this RCA + learn its patterns
to learn from a query result)
No Tier 2 · No Tier 3 · No ledger
▼ STEP I · CLEANUP & STATE TRANSITION (common to all)
checkpoint_store.delete(event.id) — investigation done, no resume needed
ask_human_tool.clear_session(event.id) — release the per-investigation Slack wiring
ephemeral · NOT stored · NOT in ledger
• Tier 2/3 memory injection: investigation only (rest skip)
• Memory + ledger storage: all except conversational
• Severity-driven limits: investigation only (others use flat per-type)
